scripts.build:css: sass public/css/style.scss public/css/style.css && sass --style=compressed public/css/style.scss public/css/style.min.css
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:css && npm run build:inject-assets
scripts.verify:functions: npm --prefix functions run lint && npm --prefix functions run build
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run build:css && npm run verify:functions
